title: Linking Words — Contrast
description: HOWEVER, ALTHOUGH, DESPITE, and IN SPITE OF express contrast in different ways.
summary_pt_br: Conectivos de contraste: HOWEVER (porém), ALTHOUGH (embora + frase), DESPITE/IN SPITE OF (apesar de + substantivo).

scenes.subtitle_en: HOWEVER, ALTHOUGH, DESPITE, and IN SPITE OF express contrast in different ways.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Conectivos de contraste: HOWEVER (porém), ALTHOUGH (embora + frase), DESPITE/IN SPITE OF (apesar de + substantivo).

scenes.text_en: HOWEVER, ALTHOUGH, DESPITE, and IN SPITE OF express contrast in different ways. Today's focus: linking words — contrast. The exam was difficult. However, most students passed.
scenes.text_pt: Conectivos de contraste: HOWEVER (porém), ALTHOUGH (embora + frase), DESPITE/IN SPITE OF (apesar de + substantivo). Foco de hoje: linking words — contrast. A prova foi difícil. Porém, a maioria passou.

scenes.title: Linking Words — Contrast
scenes.body_en: HOWEVER + comma starts a new sentence of contrast. ALTHOUGH / THOUGH + full clause. DESPITE / IN SPITE OF + noun or -ing. 'Despite the rain, we went out.' = 'Although it was raining, we went out.'
scenes.body_pt: Conectivos de contraste: HOWEVER (porém), ALTHOUGH (embora + frase), DESPITE/IN SPITE OF (apesar de + substantivo).

examples.en: The exam was difficult. However, most students passed.
examples.pt: A prova foi difícil. Porém, a maioria passou.

examples.en: Although he was tired, he finished the project.
examples.pt: Embora cansado, ele terminou o projeto.

examples.en: Despite the rain, the beach was crowded.
examples.pt: Apesar da chuva, a praia estava cheia.

exercise.question: Complete: "The exam was ___. However, most students passed."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The exam was difficult. However, most students passed."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A prova foi difícil. Porém, a maioria passou.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Although he was tired, he finished the project.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Although he was tired, he finished the project."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Embora cansado, ele terminou o projeto.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Linking Words — Contrast — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre linking words — contrast. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You wrote a strong essay. However, you could use more linking words.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Can you give me one example to improve it?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Instead of 'but I disagree', try 'however, I disagree'.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Although the idea sounds easy, I always forget.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Practice until it feels natural. Write the same point three ways.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Despite my nerves, I will keep practicing.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good. Now show me another contrast in your draft.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: In spite of the rain, we finished the race.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Excellent. Now add a 'however' sentence to your conclusion.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The plan worked. However, we lost time.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. Your writing just leveled up.

scenes.title: Zara's writing workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Zara's advice. Include at least one HOWEVER and one ALTHOUGH sentence.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the small classroom, Zara opened the essay drafts and began a quiet workshop with her students.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Although your arguments are strong, your essays lack smooth transitions between ideas.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: Can you show us how to add contrast without sounding repetitive?

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Try HOWEVER at the start of a sentence, or DESPITE followed by a noun.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: Despite the difficulty, I think I finally understand these connectors.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Good writing, Zara often said, is simply thinking clearly — then linking those thoughts with care.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Linking Words — Contrast". HOWEVER, ALTHOUGH, DESPITE, and IN SPITE OF express contrast in different ways. The exam was difficult. However, most students passed. Although he was tired, he finished the project. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Linking Words — Contrast". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Linking Words — Contrast".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
